title: Inconsistent error handling pattern in Trickle non-try methods
notes: Fixed inconsistent error handling by making fire_transmit use .expect() like expire/reset/start. Commit: 730b95f0f
close_reason: Fixed inconsistent error handling by making fire_transmit use expect() consistently with other non-try methods. Updated call now panics on invalid state instead of silently returning false. Tests and runtime guards ensure it doesn't trigger in normal operation. Commit: 613180ca3
